architecture.description: Company laptops host proprietary mbse-lite models while shared PlantUML and IDEF0 servers render figures inside the protected company network.

interface.description: Secure wired / wireless connections to access the company servers.
interface.software: The interface, if wireless, SHALL encrypt incoming and outgoing data.
The throughput SHALL be > 1 MB/s, so that the system diagrams can be rendered promptly.
